sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44995" key="eu)rudi/keia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐρῠ-δίκεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n44995.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">festival of Eurydice</tr_> at Cassandrea, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:6:7:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
